basic_info.title: Xenoblade Chronicles 3
basic_info.review: IGN praised the game as a masterpiece of modern JRPGs, highlighting its emotional depth and refined combat system.

similar_games.title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild

play_today.details: The complete experience with all DLC including Future Redeemed story expansion, additional characters, weapons, and challenge content. Best played on docked mode for optimal visuals.

recommended_patches.name: Ultimate XC3 Rebalance Mod
recommended_patches.description: Comprehensive combat rebalance that improves Keves arts timing and adds third positional art slot. Version 1.0 is the latest stable release.

recommended_patches.name: Noah, City Costume & Attachments
recommended_patches.description: Fixes graphical issues while using rebalance mods and adds costume options for Noah character.

optimal_settings: Enable VSync for stable frame rate

play_today.details: The original release without DLC content. Still offers the full main story experience but lacks Future Redeemed epilogue and additional characters.

optimal_settings: Enable VSync for stable frame rate

play_today.details: Standalone epilogue story set after the main game. Features new battle mechanics like Unity Combo and continues the story of Noah and Mio. Requires base game for full access.

optimal_settings: Enable VSync for stable frame rate

play_today.details: Third entry representing the standard Switch experience without Switch 2 enhancements. It offers the complete game with all expansions and English text. Performance is stable but lower than Switch 2, with occasional frame drops. It is the most widely available version, ensuring easy access for all players.

recommended_patches.name: Xenoblade Chronicles 3 Official Update v2.2.1
recommended_patches.description: Official Nintendo patch for the Nintendo Switch version that implements performance adjustments and bug fixes specifically for the Switch 2 hardware while maintaining compatibility with the original Switch.

recommended_patches.name: Xenoblade Chronicles 3 Expansion Pass Bug Fix
recommended_patches.description: Official patch addressing specific issues with the Expansion Pass DLC on the Nintendo Switch, ensuring proper loading and functionality of additional content.

recommended_patches.name: XC3 Visual Enhancement Patch Collection
recommended_patches.description: Community-created patch collection for the Nintendo Switch version that modifies texture files to improve Level of Detail (LOD) and remove distracting motion blur effects.

recommended_patches.name: Xenoblade Chronicles 3 Depth of Field Improvements
recommended_patches.description: A mod for the Nintendo Switch version that adjusts camera depth of field settings to provide clearer visuals during combat and exploration sequences.

description.synopsis: Set in a war-torn world called Aionios, Xenoblade Chronicles 3 follows two rival nations, Keves and Agnus, locked in an eternal conflict. Players control a group of soldiers who discover a mysterious power that could end the war but at a great personal cost. The story explores themes of sacrifice, memory, and the cyclical nature of war.
key_features: Blade Arts combat system with real-time action and cooldown management
Chain Attack mechanic allowing synchronized multi-character combos
Cross-Blade system enabling character swapping and skill inheritance
Open-world exploration with seamless transitions between zones
Base management and customization via the 'Home' mechanic
Dynamic weather and day-night cycle affecting gameplay
Cooperative multiplayer mode for specific missions
Deep narrative integration with previous Xenoblade Chronicles entries
Character progression through Arts, Skills, and Equipment
Strategic party composition with elemental affinities
legacy_and_impact: Xenoblade Chronicles 3 is widely regarded as a pinnacle of the JRPG genre, concluding the trilogy with emotional resonance and mechanical refinement. Its exploration of war, sacrifice, and unity has left a lasting impact on fans and critics alike, solidifying Monolith Soft's reputation for storytelling excellence.
